evidence_index_entries.public_safe_note: Boundary document path only; it does not prove terminal closure, readiness, legal clearance, patent protection, customer readiness, paid launch, or deployment readiness.
Witness packet path only; it contains public-safe preparation notes and no secret, private, customer, reviewer, account, provider, or live endpoint evidence.
Validator path only; local validation does not prove legal clearance, patent protection, customer readiness, paid launch, terminal closure, or deployment readiness.
Focused test path only; targeted tests do not prove full product, customer, public-runtime, legal, commercial, or deployment readiness.
Receipt-validator path only; saved receipts remain local evidence and do not authorize terminal closure, public claims, paid launch, or deployment.
Source-control packet path only; it does not authorize staging, commit, push, pull request, publication, release, or deployment.
Readiness snapshot path only; it preserves local status without promoting legal, customer, paid-use, public-runtime, or deployment readiness.
Public-copy routing path only; it does not publish externally, invite access, open a waitlist, start a beta, start a pilot, or deploy.

next_action: keep the evidence index as a local navigation packet; do not promote evidence, claim terminal closure, claim readiness, claim legal clearance, claim patent protection, claim customer readiness, launch paid use, record secret evidence, publish externally, or deploy
